non_text: Right now I can only read text messages. Tell me what you'd like to talk about in writing?

errors.generic: Something went wrong on my end. Give me a moment and try again.
errors.overloaded: Anthropic's servers are at capacity right now — give me a couple of minutes and try again. This usually clears within 5-10 minutes.
errors.rate_limit: You're sending messages a bit fast — give me a moment and try again.
errors.llm_daily_limit: You've hit today's AI usage limit — come back tomorrow and we'll pick up where we left off.
errors.llm_monthly_budget: I'm at capacity for this month — try again in a few days.

commands.no_idea: You haven't shared an idea with me yet. Tell me about it — what are you thinking?
commands.no_homework: No active homework right now. What's the next move?
commands.no_progress: No journey milestones yet. Once we work on tasks together, I'll track them here.
commands.help:
Here's what I can do:
/start — restart our conversation
/myidea — show your current idea
/newidea — archive the current idea and explore a new one
/homework — list your pending tasks
/progress — show your journey timeline
/language — switch language (English / Shqip)
/help — show this message

Otherwise just text me normally. I remember everything across sessions and I'll ping you when we agree on a task.
commands.language_set: Got it — I'll write in {language} from here.
commands.deletedata_confirm: This permanently deletes all your data (profile, ideas, conversations, homework). Reply YES to confirm or anything else to cancel.
commands.deletedata_done: All your data has been deleted. Send /start if you want to begin fresh.
commands.deletedata_cancel: Cancelled — your data is still here.

followup.default_checkin: Hey — checking in on the task we talked about. How did it go?
